# DOSSIER: GENERAL

> **Versao:** 1.0.0
> **Atualizado:** 2026-03-16
> **Auto-gerado por:** cascading.py v1.0

---

## VISAO GERAL

Theme dossier consolidando insights de multiplas fontes.

---

## ALEX-HORMOZI — Atualizacao 2026-03-16

**Insights:** 130

- **[HIGH]** Closing gives people decision-making POWER, not persuasion - the goal is empowerment to decide, not manipulation to buy
- **[HIGH]** ONION OF BLAME Framework: All objections fall into 3 layers - Circumstances (external), Other People (relational), Self (internal)
- **[HIGH]** 3 AUDIENCE BUCKETS from advertising: YES (lay downs), NO (unqualified), MAYBE (on the fence) - closers exist for the MAYBE bucket
- **[HIGH]** STAR Qualification: Situation (problem), Timing (urgency), Authority (decision power), Resources (money)
- **[HIGH]** The REASON close: The reason someone says they cannot do something is exactly why they need to do it
- **[HIGH]** Price objection reframe: "Price too high" = "Value too low" - shift focus from price paid to value received
- **[HIGH]** Resourcefulness > Resources: Every self-made millionaire started at zero - the difference is resourcefulness, not resources
- **[HIGH]** Decision Maker objection: Ask for SUPPORT not PERMISSION - giving power to spouse creates resentment
- **[HIGH]** Burned Before reframe: Dont let one bad decision BURN YOU TWICE - once when made, twice when preventing good decision
- **[HIGH]** Pain of Change principle: We change when pain of staying same > pain of change - otherwise ordering more of current state


---

## PEDRO-VALERIO — Atualizacao 2026-03-16

**Fonte:** MCE Pipeline cascading
**Insights:** 23

- **[HIGH]** Processos quebram quando se muda o executor sem mudar o modelo mental. O problema nunca e tecnico — e o modelo mental do processo.
- **[HIGH]** Fluxograma nao e processo. Fluxograma e representacao visual. Processo e mecanismo operacional com estados, transicoes, validacoes e responsaveis formais.
- **[HIGH]** Dependencia de memoria humana nao e controle, e esperanca. Processos precisam de mecanismos de auto-validacao (checkpoints).
- **[HIGH]** Task-First: toda atividade deve ser definida pela tarefa, nao pelo executor. Pergunte primeiro O QUE precisa ser feito, depois QUEM faz.
- **[MEDIUM]** Paradigma nao se aprende em curso — se internaliza com pratica. Ser obcecado com clareza operacional e paradigma.
- **[HIGH]** Use seus proprios produtos internamente antes de vender para fora. Dogfooding obrigatorio.
- **[HIGH]** 4 Executores: Humano (julgamento contextual), Agent (decisao autonoma), Worker (execucao repetitiva), Clone (replicacao de expertise). Cada caixa do processo precisa de tipo de executor definido.
- **[HIGH]** Hierarquia Composicional: Tokens > Atoms > Molecules > Organisms > Templates > Instances. Problemas de processo sempre ocorrem em um nivel especifico.
- **[HIGH]** Diferencie Hook (gancho narrativo) de Thumb Stopping (estimulo visual/sonoro/cenico que para o scroll). Sao categorias separadas que podem ser empilhadas.
- **[MEDIUM]** Composite Score: scores compostos para avaliacao automatizada. Base 5, com penalidades. Foque nos top scores.
